name: Dhruv Tangri
title: Data Scientist / AI Engineer
summary: Data Scientist with 4 years of experience using SQL, Python, and statistical analysis to influence product and business decisions. Currently pursuing a Masters at Carnegie Mellon (GPA 3.96) while working as an AI Engineer building RAG pipelines and multi-agent systems. Skilled at bridging the gap between raw data and actionable business insight.

education.degree: Masters in Information Systems Management - Business Intelligence and Data Analytics
education.notes: Coursework: Distributed Systems, Machine Learning, NoSQL Database Management, Data Structures and Algorithms, Deep Learning, Applied Econometrics
Strong quantitative foundation; transitioned into data science and analytics post-graduation

work_history.summary: Building and productionizing RAG pipelines and multi-agent AI systems for PDF and video knowledge bases.
work_history.impact: Improved ingestion throughput by 33% and retrieval accuracy by 30% via multi-threaded concurrent chunking and Milvus integration. Orchestrated retrieval, summarization, and reasoning agents using LangGraph; containerized via Docker.

work_history.summary: Primary analytics contact for client/vendor onboarding and risk & compliance operations.
work_history.impact: Reduced onboarding time by 75%. Analyzed 50k+ tickets using SQL + Python, improving case resolution rates by 22% and reducing throughput bottlenecks by 28%. Reduced SLA breaches by 15% in one quarter.

work_history.summary: Designed data models, built BI dashboards, and applied ML for anomaly detection across finance, HR, and operations clients.
work_history.impact: Designed scalable data models powering 900+ BI reports with 40% query latency improvement. Reduced SQL processing time from 3 hours to 1 hour. Applied Isolation Forest on 1.2M+ financial records achieving 95% anomaly-detection accuracy, saving 40+ hours of manual audit work.

side_projects.name: RegHealth Navigator
side_projects.description: Full-stack app for healthcare professionals to analyze Medicare regulations using semantic search and AI-powered document comparison. Incremental processing system that auto-fetches Federal Register regulations.
side_projects.impact: Reduced processing costs by 80% through intelligent caching and incremental updates.

side_projects.name: Legal Document Assistant
side_projects.description: Full-stack app for document automation that detects and fills .docx placeholders through conversational AI with smart field matching and real-time progress tracking.

side_projects.name: COVID-19 Outcomes & Vaccine Uptake Prediction
side_projects.description: Predictive models to estimate COVID-19 test positivity and vaccine uptake from 4,000+ survey observations.
side_projects.impact: Achieved R2 = 0.879. Translated statistical findings into actionable public health strategies.
